name: VS Sound
description: Play sounds and trigger actions based on VS Code events, actions, and notifications, among other things.

vssound.features.diagnostics.description: Play sounds when diagnostics include errors

vssound.features.tasks.description: Play sounds when tasks finish (success or failure)

vssound.diagnostics.edgeTriggerOnly.description: Play error sound only when the active file gains errors (or you switch to a file that already has errors), not on every diagnostic refresh while errors remain

vssound.volumePercent.description: Playback volume 0–100%. 0 = silent (skip). Applied where the player supports it (afplay, ffplay, mpv, Windows MCI). WAV via PowerShell and paplay/aplay may ignore this.

vssound.sounds.terminal.description: Audio file path for the first output on a terminal session

vssound.sounds.error.description: Audio file path when diagnostics include errors

vssound.sounds.buildFailure.description: Audio file path when a task process exits with non-zero code

vssound.sounds.buildSuccess.description: Audio file path when a task process exits with code 0

vssound.sounds.test.description: Audio file path for the Play Test Sound command

vssound.cooldown.errorMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between diagnostic error sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.buildSuccessMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between task success sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.buildFailureMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between task failure sounds (0 = no limit)

vssound.cooldown.terminalMs.description: Minimum milliseconds between terminal-triggered sounds when wired (0 = no limit)

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build ./src/extension.ts --outfile=./dist/extension.js --target=node --format=cjs --external vscode
